member.name: T:Bonsai.Harp.Design.DeviceConfigurationEditor
member.summary: Provides a user interface editor that displays a dialog box for inspecting and updating the current device firmware.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Harp.Design.Properties.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Harp.Design.Properties.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Harp.Design.Properties.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Harp.Design.Properties.Resources.Harp
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Icon similar to (Icon).

member.name: P:Bonsai.Harp.Design.Properties.Resources.ResetDeviceName_Question
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This will reset the device name to its factory default. Do you want to continue?.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Harp.Design.Properties.Resources.ResetPersistentRegisters_Question
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This will reset the device to its default factory settings. Do you want to continue?.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Harp.Design.Properties.Resources.UpdateDeviceFirmware_Caption
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Update Device Firmware.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Harp.Design.Properties.Resources.UpdateDeviceFirmware_Label
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Updating device firmware. Please wait....

member.name: P:Bonsai.Harp.Design.Properties.Resources.UpdateDeviceFirmware_NotSupported
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The specified firmware is not supported by the device hardware..

member.name: P:Bonsai.Harp.Design.Properties.Resources.UpdateDeviceFirmware_Question
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Are you sure you want to update the device firmware? This action cannot be undone..

member.name: P:Bonsai.Harp.Design.Properties.Resources.UpdateDeviceName_Caption
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Update Device Name.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Harp.Design.Properties.Resources.UpdateDeviceName_Label
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Setting device name. Please wait....

member.name: P:Bonsai.Harp.Design.Properties.Resources.UpdateDeviceName_Question
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Do you want to write the new device name to non-volatile memory?.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Harp.Design.Properties.Resources.WorkflowRunning_Error
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The Harp device configuration cannot be changed while the workflow is running. Please stop the workflow and try again..
